title: CDT citizen-channel projection and discount-eligibility rules
statement: CDT endpoints are a read projection over national data (SNE notifications, RENAINF/CDT infractions, vehicles, CNH) — NOT an identity provider. Rules CDT.C001–C004: an unknown citizen (no condutor, no owned vehicle, no débito) yields 404 CDT.CITIZEN.NOT_FOUND (C001); an unknown numeroAit yields 404 CDT.INFRACTION.NOT_FOUND (C002); the payment projection exposes the discount tier (40% recognition path, 20% path, or none) and boleto availability; a reconhecimento on an infraction with no discount or an unavailable boleto yields 402 CDT.DISCOUNT.NOT_AVAILABLE (C003); a reconhecimento on a terminal/already-recognized infraction yields 402 CDT.RECOGNITION.NOT_ALLOWED (C004). The single write (reconhecimento) is audited per INV-IDEMP-001.
rationale: CDT is the citizen-facing projection of national traffic data. It must reflect SNE/RENAINF state and the discount rules deterministically so pec/teat can exercise citizen flows without CDT becoming a second identity or app backend.
